content.markdown:
# Global toast

Global toasts appear at a fixed position on screen, independent of the triggering element.

---

## When to use

- To confirm background action completions.
- To surface non-critical errors or warnings that do not block the user.
- Do not use for actions that require user input.
- For confirmations that need to persist, use an [alert / banner](alert-banner) instead.

## Style

- Keep to one short sentence.
- Include an undo action where relevant.

## Examples

| Scenario | Toast text |
|---|---|
| Dataset deleted | Dataset deleted. Undo |
| Export complete | Export ready. Download |
| Connection failed | Connection failed. Try again |

content.prose: Global toasts appear at a fixed position on screen, independent of the triggering element.
